title: Bounded Rational Real-Analysis Checks

solver_reuse.target: bounded real-analysis bad linear-delta QF_LRA/Farkas regression seed
solver_reuse.pressure: Bounded epsilon-delta counterexample where exact replay computes output_distance = 4/3, but the malformed row claims output_distance < 1.
solver_reuse.next_step: Promote additional bounded real-analysis rows only when they add distinct exact-linear solver pressure; keep completeness, fully quantified limit laws, and arbitrary epsilon-delta theorems in the Lean-horizon lane.

graduation_criteria: Encode bounded rational interval, ball, and epsilon-delta checks as exact QF_LRA obligations.
Replay finite SAT witnesses through exact rational arithmetic rather than floating-point tolerances.
Keep false bounded delta claims on Axeyum's checked Farkas evidence path when the counterexample obligation is linear.
Keep general real-analysis theorems, completeness, and fully quantified limits marked Lean-horizon until no-sorry Lean artifacts exist.
